commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates queue-by-channel config schema/types for Matrix, Google Chat, and Mattermost, refreshes config baseline hashes, adds config/schema regression tests, and records the user-visible fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main's strict `messages.queue.byChannel` schema omits `matrix`, and the linked source PR records the same config failing before the patch and validating after it.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because the diff has no actionable review findings; exact-head automerge/CI can gate the merge.
